Choose to take care of your little ones' health!

Book Appointment Contact Us

Expert Intensive Care

18+ years specialized PICU experience with UK training.

Personalized Approach

Tailored treatment with compassionate family care.

Advanced Technology

State-of-the-art PICU with latest equipment.

COMPREHENSIVE PEDIATRIC CARE

Specialized Healthcare Services for Children

Expert medical care tailored to your child's unique needs, from routine checkups to specialized intensive care treatment.

General Pediatrics

Comprehensive care for your child's health and development from birth to adolescence, including wellness checkups and preventive care.

Read more →

Pediatric Intensive Care

Advanced critical care for children with severe illnesses or injuries, utilizing state-of-the-art PICU facilities and international protocols.

Read more →

Growth & Development

Comprehensive tracking of your child's physical growth and developmental milestones from infancy to adolescence.

Read more →

Vaccinations

Safe and timely immunizations to protect your child from preventable diseases, following the latest IAP vaccination schedule recommendations.

Read more →

Emergency Care

24/7 emergency pediatric care for urgent medical situations, ensuring immediate attention and expert treatment when your child needs it most.

Read more →

Schedule a consultation appointment today

Expert pediatric care is just a call away. Book your appointment and give your child the healthcare they deserve.

Book an Appointment

Need Expert Pediatric Care?

Schedule a consultation with Dr. Sanjay D Swamy today.

Book Appointment Call Now

ABOUT DR. SWAMY

Professional Summary

Dr. Sanjay D Swamy is a Chief Paediatric Intensivist based in Jayanagar, Bangalore. With 18 years of specialist experience in Paediatric Intensive Care, advanced critical care techniques, and international training. Specialized in treating critically ill neonates and children through dedicated fellowship training with extensive hands-on experience in complex paediatric procedures.

18
Years of Specialist Experience
Extensive expertise in PICU and critical care has positively impacted thousands of children and families.
7
Leading Institutions
Trained and worked across prestigious hospitals in India and UK including Birmingham Children's Hospital.
Book an Appointment More About Me

AWARDS & RECOGNITION

Honoring Excellence in Pediatric Care

Recognized for outstanding contributions to pediatric intensive care medicine and dedication to improving child healthcare outcomes.

Same-Day Appointments Available

Don't wait — get your child the care they need today.

Book Now Call Now

TESTIMONIALS

What our great patients say
about Dr. Sanjay D Swamy

Committed to maintaining the highest standards in pediatric intensive care. Professional certifications reflect years of training, continued education, and dedication to providing safe, evidence-based treatment.

⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

"Exceptional care and expertise"

Dr. Swamy's expertise in pediatric intensive care gave us confidence during our child's critical condition. His compassionate approach and clear communication made a difficult time more manageable.

P
Priya K.
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

"Highly skilled and caring"

We are grateful for Dr. Swamy's dedication and expertise. His international training and experience truly show in the quality of care he provides. Our baby received the best possible treatment.

R
Rajesh M.
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

"Outstanding pediatric specialist"

Dr. Swamy's years of experience in PICU made all the difference for our son. He took time to explain everything clearly and ensured we were comfortable with every decision.

S
Sneha R.
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

"Trusted and professional"

The level of care and attention our daughter received was exceptional. Dr. Swamy's UK training and expertise in critical care gave us peace of mind during a stressful time.

A
Arun S.
